commits.subject: Auto-commit from AoPS-HQ-BAProd-MEichenlaub via sync-all
auto-fix 09540: suppress translucent achromatic-gray nolight flat-planar fills (buckyball pentagons render as white wireframe in TeXeR)
auto-fix 01966: re-project fit3 with its own projection + honor size(pic,W) + keep chromatic plane fills
auto-fix 00444: honor pic arg in labelx/labely + anisotropic label-extent shrink for IgnoreAspect size()
auto-fix 04202: implement latticeshade(path,pen[][]) + 2D palette() for Rainbow pseudocolor fill
auto-fix 04743: implement transform^integer (repeated composition) for rotation-symmetry idiom
comparator: persist diagram ID and grid page in URL query string
ssim-stats: narrow histogram to 0.005 bins over [0.80, 1.0]
comparator: restore EPS collection as a durable virtual collection
auto-fix 12481: cap explicit Size= tick length to plotted axis limits, not pre-Crop graph bbox
auto-fix 00953: render arrow(arrowhead,path,pen,Relative(t)) overload + TeXHead chevrons at mid-path positions
auto-fix 00448: implement Broken() axis scale, ScaleX/ScaleY, broken-axis ticks, and Break glyph
auto-fix 08673: implement binarytree module (preorder tree of numbered circle nodes + directed arrows)
auto-fix 02422: correct MathJax CM advance-width (~7% narrow) via horizontal stretch + restore single-line label side-bearing margin
auto-fix 02422: render \begin{array} grids as stacked per-row colored labels (MathJax can't render array envs)
auto-fix: SSIM stats checkpoint
auto-fix 12008: fit currentpicture=transform*currentpicture multi-panel composites to ~400bp
auto-fix 00178: skip autoscale rounding for explicit-Step ticks; extend arrow-side axis end by one arrow length
auto-fix 04642: bind pathticks s= to tick size (exact param), not spacing
auto-fix 02434: implement inside(path,path) overload for pixel-fill of moon region
auto-fix 07613: implement intersections(path,path) real[][] builtin for Venn subpath fills
fix run-loop hang after full SSIM pipeline
Auto-commit from AoPS-HQ-BAProd-MEichenlaub via sync-all
auto-fix 05929: render ArcArrow(SimpleHead) as unfilled chevron, skip 7bp floor for label-anchored flat banners, size SimpleHead unboosted, directional arrow overshoot padding
auto-fix 03668: fit thin/small no-size short-label diagrams to defaultSize via actual label-expanded bbox
auto-fix 04213: implement bbox(picture) wrapper and per-picture pic.size()
auto-fix 06065: uniform-scale label-dominated no-align path-label diagrams toward ~400bp
auto-fix 00115: fix inverted x-axis RightTicks direction, default tick length on limit-expanded axes, and over-pushed axis title
auto-fix: SSIM stats checkpoint
parallelize ssim-pipeline with worker_threads for true CPU concurrency
auto-fix 08230: alias orthocentercenter to geometry orthocenter so H lands at (1,1) instead of origin
auto-fix 00662: parse 4th positional arg of tangent() as index n so n=2 returns the lower tangent point (P/Q chords no longer collapse)
auto-fix 11731: define spPurpleFill (alias palette purple) so filldraw renders the segment lavender instead of falling back to a black pen
auto-fix 08867: render no-size add(picture) composites at true bp size (floor pxPerUnit>=1.0) so large multi-picture diagrams keep natural extent instead of shrinking to defaultSize=150
auto-fix 00468: render `dotted` with a real 1*w on-length so Blink (now default rasterizer) draws full-weight dots, fixing 12203 canary regression (0.01-dash was too thin under Blink)
auto-fix 00468: scope \pad tabular-cell expansion to texts containing \begin{tabular} so it provably cannot touch any non-tabular diagram
parallelize rasterize and ssim steps in ssim-pipeline.js with configurable concurrency
auto-fix 00468: expand AoPS \pad macro to row-break+"pad" so tabular dot-label renders as two upright "Launch"/"pad" lines (also fixes 00467)
auto-fix 04456: place scale(0.75) SE caption by its scaled width (not full-size) + reserve MathJax side-bearing margin in the size() bbox
auto-fix 07413: fit complex-plane circle (c462_L3) to defaultSize via bidirectional-surround clamp + raise label-density floor threshold to 5e-4
auto-fix 04633: project triple endpoints in dot(a^^b^^c) multi-dot branch so 3D base-vertex dots land on the projected geometry instead of raw (x,y)
auto-fix 04386: extend _isLargeSquareRadial (minDim>50) to catch small-radius dihedral Cayley diagrams, bypassing the label-density floor that oversized them ~2.7x
auto-fix 02582: MathJax-measure fraction labels in size() solver + clamp keepAspect size() padded canvas to target
auto-fix: SSIM stats checkpoint
auto-fix 11891: order circle-circle intersectionpoints top-first to match Asymptote
auto-fix 04331: render BeginBar tick marks and stop shrinking dense label-grids
auto-fix 03322: keep endpoint tick labels when begin=false/end=false suppresses only the tick mark and gridline, not the numeric label
auto-fix 00287: drop the 6% flat poke on bare yaxis() so a tall aspect-extreme figure isn't bbox-inflated/shifted under SSIM
auto-fix 04155: place axes() y-label rotated at top endpoint for non-degenerate y-data, keeping centered placement for horizontal-line plots
auto-fix: SSIM stats checkpoint
auto-fix 06679: markangle honors Fill(red)/FillDraw filltype by filling the angular wedge and suppressing the stroke for pure Fill
auto-fix 02807: grow size() output to hold a truesize underbrace/hspace wider than the size() box
auto-fix 08046: interp() with geometry point/vector operands now lerps coordinates instead of collapsing to a scalar
auto-fix 03389: honor format=Label(" ") blank-tick idiom to suppress axis numbers while preserving axis-label spacing
auto-fix 00125: render \cos/\sin upright and stop \frac overlapping operator; match viewBox width to renderLaTeXSVG
auto-fix: SSIM stats checkpoint
auto-fix 00572: left-align non-\centering minipages, italicize inline prose math, space frac trig operators
auto-fix 00572: stop MP() drawing spurious vertex dots (cse5 MP is label-only)
auto-fix 04428: implement remainder() so cyclic [0,1,2] labels resolve instead of all [0]
auto-fix 01545: render draw(Label,box,Fill) as a positioned grey-filled boxed label
auto-fix 04570: make UnFill callable (UnFill(0.1mm)) so label background clears gridlines behind $2-3i$
auto-fix 11614: add cse5 IntersectionPoint(path,path) alias so X intersection resolves instead of collapsing to origin
auto-fix: SSIM stats checkpoint
auto-fix 08739: axis-label Fill box ignored screenDy, erasing x-tick numbers
auto-fix 12131: wide E/W labels clipped — overshoot pad gated on anchor-at-edge not actual overflow
auto-fix 03348: bare UnFill in Label() dropped erase box; line drew through label text
auto-fix 05547: filldraw outline gets same stroke boost as draw()
auto-fix 03290: nolight gray graph-surface renders white-faced wireframe; thick() meshpen + z-axis to data-max
auto-fix run-loop: fix claude-fable-5 → opus-4-8; halt on fast-error to preserve queue
auto-fix 08518: D(pair) routes to dot(); MP() defaults to South alignment
auto-fix: reset canary baselines after codetab contamination; update queue state
auto-fix 04422: register identity() transform so non-rotated geometry isn't dropped
katex-svg: fix missing glyphs in blink comparator and hash-load race in index.html; v8.18
